channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Trump pulls Casey Means' stalled surgeon general nomination, announces new pick
item.description: President Trump says he's nominating former Fox News Channel contributor Dr. Nicole Saphier for surgeon general after Dr. Casey Means' path forward stalled in the Senate over questions about her experience and her stance on vaccines.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump says he's nominating former Fox News Channel contributor Dr. Nicole Saphier for surgeon general after Dr. Casey Means' path forward stalled in the Senate over questions about her experience and her stance on vaccines.

(Image credit: Tom Brenner)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: U.S. House primaries in Louisiana are suspended after Voting Rights Act ruling
item.description: Louisiana suspended its upcoming primaries for the U.S. House, following Wednesday's U.S. Supreme Court ruling that the state's congressional map is an "unconstitutional racial gerrymander."
item.content:encoded:
Louisiana suspended its upcoming primaries for the U.S. House, following Wednesday's U.S. Supreme Court ruling that the state's congressional map is an "unconstitutional racial gerrymander."

(Image credit: Mark Schiefelbein)
item.dc:creator: Benjamin Swasey

item.title: In real-world test, an AI model did better than ER doctors at diagnosing patients
item.description: Researchers evaluated how well an AI model could diagnose and make decisions about patient care.
item.content:encoded:
Researchers evaluated how well an AI model could diagnose and make decisions about patient care.

(Image credit: shapecharge/E+)
item.dc:creator: Will Stone

item.title: The Onion's bid to take over Infowars hits another snag
item.description: A Texas appeals court granted Jones's request to pause a deal that would allow the satirical website The Onion to license the Infowars brand name and turn the show into a mockery of itself.
item.content:encoded:
A Texas appeals court granted Jones's request to pause a deal that would allow the satirical website The Onion to license the Infowars brand name and turn the show into a mockery of itself.

(Image credit: Mario Tama)
item.dc:creator: Tovia Smith

item.title: Congress ends record shutdown at the Department of Homeland Security
item.description: Thursday's vote in the House provides funding for DHS after a more than two-month shutdown, but does not include dollars for Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Customs and Border Protection.
item.content:encoded:
Thursday's vote in the House provides funding for DHS after a more than two-month shutdown, but does not include dollars for Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Customs and Border Protection.

(Image credit: J. Scott Applewhite)
item.dc:creator: Eric McDaniel

item.title: Myanmar junta says Suu Kyi moved to house arrest, doubts linger
item.description: The secrecy surrounding Suu Kyi's new location has alarmed her son, Kim Aris, who says he has received no authoritative confirmation of her wellbeing.
item.content:encoded: The secrecy surrounding Suu Kyi's new location has alarmed her son, Kim Aris, who says he has received no authoritative confirmation of her wellbeing.
item.dc:creator: Lorcan Lovett

item.title: Craig Venter, pioneering human genome decoder, dies at 79
item.description: Pioneering scientist J. Craig Venter has died at 79. His "whole genome shotgun method" helped genome sequencing become faster and cheaper.
item.content:encoded:
Pioneering scientist J. Craig Venter has died at 79. His "whole genome shotgun method" helped genome sequencing become faster and cheaper.

(Image credit: K.C. Alfred/The San Diego Union-Tribune)
item.dc:creator: Nell Greenfieldboyce

item.title: 'Fool me once…' Lawyers argue Kennedy Center should not meet same fate as the East Wing
item.description: Lawyers made arguments in hearings for two separate lawsuits against President Trump and the Kennedy Center's board this week. Both lawsuits want to halt plans to close the performing arts venue for two years for renovations.
item.content:encoded:
Since the name change, artists have cancelled performances and ticket sales have declined.'/>

Lawyers made arguments in hearings for two separate lawsuits against President Trump and the Kennedy Center's board this week. Both lawsuits want to halt plans to close the performing arts venue for two years for renovations.

(Image credit: MANDEL NGAN)
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Blair

item.title: U.K. calls antisemitism an emergency after arson and stabbing attacks on Jewish people
item.description: The British government pledged to increase security for Jewish communities after a string of arson attacks and a double stabbing. But members of the community lashed out at the government.
item.content:encoded:
The British government pledged to increase security for Jewish communities after a string of arson attacks and a double stabbing. But members of the community lashed out at the government.

(Image credit: Kin Cheung)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Iran war has cost $25B, Pentagon says. And, SCOTUS strikes blow to Voting Rights Act
item.description: The Pentagon estimates the war with Iran has cost $25 billion so far. And, the Supreme Court ruled that Louisiana's 2024 election map was "an unconstitutional racial gerrymander."
item.content:encoded:
The Pentagon estimates the war with Iran has cost $25 billion so far. And, the Supreme Court ruled that Louisiana's 2024 election map was "an unconstitutional racial gerrymander."

(Image credit: Kevin Dietsch)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton
